checks.name: integration_stack_result_contract
checks.note: CPU StackEngine integration outputs must carry an embedded passing result contract.

checks.name: integration_resident_result_contract
checks.note: Resident CUDA integration outputs must satisfy the resident result-contract audit.

checks.name: calibration_master_surface_contract
checks.note: Master calibration surfaces must expose stats, semantics, and StackEngine result contracts.

checks.name: resident_calibration_surface_contract
checks.note: Resident CUDA calibration surfaces must pass their resident calibration contract.

checks.name: resident_calibrated_light_contract
checks.note: Resident calibrated light records must carry frame id, stack index, backend, source stage, and in-VRAM status.

checks.name: local_normalization_contract
checks.note: LN rows must record crop_box and DQ state; enabled LN rows must record coefficient grids.
